## Tags
equilateral, delta, shape, pyramid, hierarchy, dashed

## Categories
shapes

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/triangle-dashed)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::TriangleDashed;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        TriangleDashed { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
